Package org.jlab.epsci.ersap.base

Class ErsapQueries.ErsapQueryBuilder

java.lang.Object
org.jlab.epsci.ersap.base.ErsapQueries.ErsapQueryBuilder
Enclosing class:
ErsapQueries
public static class ErsapQueries.ErsapQueryBuilder extends Object
Builds a request to query the ERSAP registration and runtime database.

  • Method Details

    • canonicalNames

      public ErsapQueries.CanonicalNameQuery<DpeName> canonicalNames(DpeFilter filter)
      Creates a query to get the names of the selected DPEs.
      Parameters:
      filter - a filter to select DPEs
      Returns:
      the query to get the names of the registered DPEs that match the filter

    • canonicalNames

      public ErsapQueries.CanonicalNameQuery<ContainerName> canonicalNames(ContainerFilter filter)
      Creates a query to get the names of the selected containers.
      Parameters:
      filter - a filter to select containers
      Returns:
      the query to get the names of the registered containers that match the filter

    • canonicalNames

      public ErsapQueries.CanonicalNameQuery<ServiceName> canonicalNames(ServiceFilter filter)
      Creates a query to get the names of the selected services.
      Parameters:
      filter - a filter to select services
      Returns:
      the query to get the names of the registered services that match the filter

    • discover

      public ErsapQueries.DiscoveryQuery<DpeName> discover(DpeName name)
      Creates a query to check if the given DPE is registered.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the selected DPE
      Returns:
      the query to check if the DPE is registered

    • discover

      public ErsapQueries.DiscoveryQuery<ContainerName> discover(ContainerName name)
      Creates a query to check if the given container is registered.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the selected container
      Returns:
      the query to check if the container is registered

    • discover

      public ErsapQueries.DiscoveryQuery<ServiceName> discover(ServiceName name)
      Creates a query to check if the given service is registered.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the selected service
      Returns:
      the query to check if the service is registered
